_comment_file: configuration values for the exercise 14 controller v2
_comment_temperature_threshold: comfort threshold used by the LED rule
_comment_alert_temperature_threshold: temperature value used to publish alert messages
_comment_stats_window_size: number of temperature samples used for rolling statistics
_comment_default_room: room used when the received message does not specify one
_comment_default_presence: initial presence value before receiving presence or motion events
_comment_fan_no_presence: fan range used when nobody is detected in the room

fan_no_presence._comment_min: temperature where the fan starts when no presence is detected
fan_no_presence._comment_max: temperature where the fan reaches maximum speed when no presence is detected

_comment_heater_no_presence: heater range used when nobody is detected in the room

heater_no_presence._comment_min: temperature where the heater is still at maximum power without presence
heater_no_presence._comment_max: temperature where the heater becomes off without presence

_comment_fan_presence: fan range used when presence is detected

fan_presence._comment_min: temperature where the fan starts when presence is detected
fan_presence._comment_max: temperature where the fan reaches maximum speed when presence is detected

_comment_heater_presence: heater range used when presence is detected

heater_presence._comment_min: temperature where the heater is at maximum power with presence
heater_presence._comment_max: temperature where the heater becomes off with presence

_comment_alert_topic_base: base MQTT topic used for temperature alerts
_comment_fallback_command_topics: default actuator topics used before catalog discovery

fallback_command_topics._comment_led: fallback topic used for LED commands
fallback_command_topics._comment_fan: fallback topic used for fan commands
fallback_command_topics._comment_heater: fallback topic used for heater commands
fallback_command_topics._comment_lcd: fallback topic used for LCD  messages

_comment_registration_refresh_seconds: how often the controller refreshes its catalog service
_comment_catalog_poll_seconds: how often the controller checks the catalog for new MQTT topics
